text.title: User Interviews Procedure
text.summary: Step-by-step procedure to apply the user-interviews methodology end-to-end.

step.name: research-questions
step.action: Write 5-10 research questions (what we need to learn).

step.name: guide-and-neutrality-review
step.action: Draft open past-behaviour interview questions; researcher reviews for leading / closed phrasing; set guide.neutrality_reviewed=true.
step.decision-gate: If any question is hypothetical or closed, rewrite before recruitment.

step.name: recruit
step.action: Recruit 5-8 participants per relevant segment; confirm informed consent for recording + AI processing.

step.name: run-sessions
step.action: Conduct sessions; record (with consent); take notes separating observation from inference; keep interviewer share ≤20%.

step.name: sanitise-and-synthesise
step.action: Run templates/transcribe-sessions.sh; replace participant names with IDs; cluster quotes into insight statements with citations.
step.output: insights with evidence + sanitised transcript log.

step.name: researcher-validate
step.action: Researcher cross-checks each insight against its cited quote; run scripts/validate-user-interviews.py; flag "ready for stakeholder review".
